utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these categories are present. Each one has a description and associated cost details (monthly and annual). Health coverage specifies both physical and mental health insurance along with costs. Property coverage specifies home/contents insurance (including an add-on) with costs. Travel coverage specifies travel insurance with costs. Additional services are explicitly included, even if 'None currently active', with costs stated. Total budget provides a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown along with savings. All items are fully specified according to the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: First, identify each distinct insurance product mentioned in the final coverage plan and match it to the corresponding ground-truth entry. In the health_coverage section, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan (Physical)' maps to the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under physical_health with rating 8, and 'VitalPlus Standard Plan (Mental)' maps to 'VitalPlus Standard Plan' under mental_health with rating 7. 'Preventive Care Package' is listed in health_enhancement_services with rating 8. In the property_coverage section, 'PrimeHome Premium Coverage' matches a rating of 10 in home_content, and 'Technology Protection Add-on' corresponds to 'Technology Protection' in property_enhancement_services with rating 10. In the travel_coverage section, 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' matches the travel_insurance entry with rating 10. No additional services were selected, so nothing else to map.
